Row.Text: Adds Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose, hero of the Indian independence movement, as a playable leader. Founder of the Azad Hind government and supreme commander of the Indian National Army.
Netaji, Supreme Commander of the Azad Hind Fauj. A relentless organizer of the struggle for complete independence — "Give me blood, and I shall give you freedom."
+5 Combat Strength for units fighting in friendly territory. Captured settlements suffer no unhappiness penalty. Gain a burst of Culture when capturing a settlement founded by another player.
Respects civilizations that rule only the settlements they founded. Despises those who occupy the homelands of others.
